curation_policy.rating_policy: No rating or rating-deviation gate; editorial Easy/Medium/Hard bands only.
curation_policy.line_policy: Historical analysis lines are staging evidence, not scored ground truth. Promotion requires first-move or branch-aware review.
curation_policy.prompt_notation: UCI is canonical. SAN fields are audit-only and must never be exposed in benchmark prompts because +/# leak tactical labels.

candidates.event: Deep Blue versus Garry Kasparov rematch
candidates.why_famous: Kasparov resigned after Deep Blue's 45.Ra6 and missed the exceptional 45...Qe3 defensive resource identified in contemporary analysis.
candidates.line_note: A pinned Stockfish 18 audit ranks Qe3 first, Qxd6 first, and Re8 first, but ranks the traditional 47.h4 only fourth. This is a first-move or branch-aware candidate, never an exact-line key.
candidates.verification: python-chess legal replay; source and engine conclusions reviewed; excluded from scored suites
